maintext: William Andrew "Drew" Copley, known as The Pull, was a founding member of Hacktivismo and a respected friend of Cult of the Dead Cow (cDc). He was a tireless advocate of internet freedom and a valued security researcher. The Pull was a ridiculously smart guy with a great sense of humor and exemplary work ethic. He was dedicated to making a mark for the better, was a core contributor to the hacktivist movement, writing a steganography app called Camera/Shy. He died of cancer in 2022.
